item.title: White House offers shifting rationales for war with Iran
item.description: From regime change to nuclear weapons, preemption to ballistic missiles, Trump’s top aides are retroactively making a broad case for a war of the pres...

item.title: What Tuesday’s big midterm contests will reveal about Trump and Democrats
item.description: New congressional maps will debut in Texas and North Carolina as Republicans try to defend their majorities and Democrats hope they can flip both cham...

item.title: How Trump assassination attempts played into his decision to attack Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump acknowledged for the first time a personal rationale for attacking Iran: “I got him before he got me.”

item.title: Justice Dept. abandons defense of orders targeting law firms
item.description: President Donald Trump’s executive orders imposing sanctions on several law firms had been struck down by judges. His administration is abandoning its...

item.title: Supreme Court sides with Christian parents in battle over school trans policies
item.description: At issue is a California law prohibiting school policies that require employees to report students’ sexual orientation and gender identity to parents.
